content.problemStatement:
Chef and his friend Chefu decided to go on a trip. The trip takes place over the next NNN days (numbered 1 through NNN). There are KKK different places Chef and Chefu could visit (numbered 1 through KKK). They have written a sequence A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã which denotes the plan of the trip during these NNN days; however, the plan is not completed yet. For each valid iii, they want to visit the place AiA_iAi‚Äã on the iii-th day, but if Ai=‚àí1A_i = -1Ai‚Äã=‚àí1, then they haven't decided which place to visit on that day.

Chef and his friend do not want to visit the same place two days in a row, but they can visit a place more than once in total. It is not necessary to visit all the places during the trip. Determine whether it is possible to complete the plan in such a way that this condition is satisfied. If it is possible, find one way of completing the plan.
constraints: 1‚â§Ai‚â§K1 \le A_i \le K1‚â§Ai‚Äã‚â§K or Ai=‚àí1A_i = -1Ai‚Äã=‚àí1 for each valid iii

if Ai‚âÝ‚àí1A_i 
eq -1Ai‚ÄãÓÄÝ=‚àí1 and Ai+1‚âÝ‚àí1A_{i+1} 
eq -1Ai+1‚ÄãÓÄÝ=‚àí1, then Ai‚âÝAi+1A_i 
eq A_{i+1}Ai‚ÄãÓÄÝ=Ai+1‚Äã, for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10,00010,00010,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case, print a line containing the string `"YES"` if it's possible the complete the plan or `"NO"` otherwise.

If it's possible to complete the plan, print a second line containing NNN space-separated integers denoting the sequence A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã after completing the plan. If there is more than one solution, you may print any one.
